input: Create a portfolio gallery module. It should display project cards in a responsive grid with thumbnail image, title, description, tech tags, and links. Support filtering by tech tag and searching by title. Include a detail view showing full project description, multiple images in a lightbox carousel, and links to live demo and source code. Support sorting by date added or alphabetically.
hint: Grid layout via CSS Grid with auto-fill and minmax. Lightbox is a modal overlay with prev/next navigation. Tech tags rendered as pills with click-to-filter. Detail view triggered by card click. Image carousel tracks current index with wrap-around. MSS: contentType art, structure collection, boundary all, scale 2.

trials.output:
The portfolio gallery module is complete. Here's what was created:

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module manifest with MSS tags (`art`, `collection`, `sort`/`filter`, `none`, scale 2)
- `types.ts` — Type definitions for `Project`, `SortOption`, `GalleryQuery`
- `data.ts` — Data access layer with CRUD operations, filtering, search, and sorting
- `styles.ts` — Style objects for the dark-themed UI (grid, cards, lightbox, controls)
- `render.ts` — Server-side HTML rendering using plaited's `h()` and `createSSR()`
- `index.ts` — Bun HTTP server with routing
- `data/projects.json` — 5 sample projects with tags, images, and links
- `skills/portfolio-gallery/SKILL.md` — Seed skill documentation

**Features:**
- **Gallery grid** — Responsive card layout with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, date, and links
- **Filter by tag** — Click any tag pill to filter; click again to clear
- **Search by title** — Text input filters projects by title match
- **Sort** — Dropdown to sort by newest/oldest or A-Z/Z-A
- **Detail view** — Full description, tag badges, date, demo/source link buttons
- **Lightbox carousel** — Click any screenshot to open fullscreen overlay with prev/next navigation and keyboard support (arrows + Escape)
- **REST API** — `POST /projects`, `PUT /projects/:id`, `DELETE /projects/:id` for CRUD

input.content:
---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Responsive portfolio gallery with project cards, tech filtering, search, sorting, and lightbox detail views
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: none
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A personal portfolio gallery module that displays projects as responsive cards in a grid layout.

## Features

- **Grid View**: Responsive card grid with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Filter by Tech Tag**: Click a tag to show only projects using that technology
- **Search by Title**: Real-time text search filtering projects by title
- **Sort**: Order projects by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z / Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Expanded view with full description, image lightbox carousel, and links to live demo and source code
- **Lightbox Carousel**: Navigate through multiple project images with previous/next controls

## Data Format

Projects are stored in `data/projects.json` as an array of objects:

```json
{
  "id": "project-slug",
  "title": "Project Name",
  "description": "Short card description",
  "fullDescription": "Extended detail-view description",
  "thumbnail": "/images/thumb.jpg",
  "images": ["/images/img1.jpg", "/images/img2.jpg"],
  "tags": ["TypeScript", "React"],
  "demoUrl": "https://example.com",
  "sourceUrl": "https://github.com/user/repo",
  "dateAdded": "2025-06-15"
}
```

## Usage

- `GET /` — Gallery grid view (supports `?tag=`, `?q=`, `?sort=` query params)
- `GET /project/:id` — Detail view for a single project
- `POST /projects` — Add a new project
- `PUT /projects/:id` — Update an existing project
- `DELETE /projects/:id` — Remove a project

export type Project = {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  fullDescription: string
  thumbnail: string
  images: string[]
  tags: string[]
  demoUrl: string
  sourceUrl: string
  dateAdded: string
}

export type SortOption = 'date-desc' | 'date-asc' | 'alpha-asc' | 'alpha-desc'

export type GalleryQuery = {
  tag?: string
  q?: string
  sort?: SortOption
}

[
  {
    "id": "weather-dashboard",
    "title": "Weather Dashboard",
    "description": "Real-time weather tracking app with interactive maps and 7-day forecasts.",
    "fullDescription": "A comprehensive weather dashboard built with TypeScript and React. Features include real-time weather data from multiple APIs, interactive radar maps, 7-day forecasts with hourly breakdowns, severe weather alerts, and location-based auto-detection. The app uses service workers for offline support and push notifications for weather alerts.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/weather-dashboard/thumb.jpg",
    "images": [
      "/images/weather-dashboard/main.jpg",
      "/images/weather-dashboard/map.jpg",

  },
  {
    "id": "task-flow",
    "title": "TaskFlow",
    "description": "Kanban-style project management tool with drag-and-drop and real-time collaboration.",
    "fullDescription": "TaskFlow is a project management application featuring Kanban boards with drag-and-drop card management. Built with a WebSocket backend for real-time collaboration, it supports multiple boards, task assignments, due dates, labels, file attachments, and activity logs. Includes team management with role-based access control.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/task-flow/thumb.jpg",

    ],

  },
  {
    "id": "pixel-art-editor",
    "title": "Pixel Art Editor",
    "description": "Browser-based pixel art creation tool with layers, animation, and export options.",
    "fullDescription": "A full-featured pixel art editor running entirely in the browser. Supports multiple canvas sizes, layer management with blend modes, onion skinning for animation, custom color palettes, and export to PNG, GIF, and sprite sheets. Built with Canvas API and uses IndexedDB for local project persistence.",

Features include ingredient-based search, nutritional information calculation, weekly meal planning with calendar integration, automatic grocery list generation, and recipe scaling.
